Interior Architecture and Environmental Design

About the Department

MENU

The contents of the academic curriculum is composed amongst the subjects towards comprehension of the basic design principles in private and general places and gaining of the designer identity.  Academic medium is thus formed with its highly comprehensive program, for the formation and actualization of ideological and innovative designer identities, to raise fully equipped interior architects with self esteem, unique visions, creativity and at the same time able to compete on the global design arena.

The training is sustained by multi disciplinary interactions, both theoretical and applied programs, industry linked projects and various seminars.
